title: SmartTranslate
description: Translates over 100+ Languages faster that you can read this Text
body:
# SmartTranslate

SmartTranslate is a Minecraft plugin that automatically translates chat messages into each player's preferred language — in real time.

## 📦 Features

- Translate chat messages to each player’s language
- Set preferred language with `/language <code>`
- Translates confirmation message into selected language
- Uses **Google Translate API** (or compatible alternatives like LibreTranslate)

---

## 🚀 How It Works

1. Players use `/language <code>` to choose their language
2. All chat messages are translated live for every player
3. The translated version is shown to each recipient in their own language
4. When setting a language, a translated confirmation is shown

---

## 🔧 Commands

### `/language <code>`

Set your preferred language for translations. Example:

```mcfunction
/language fr

This will make all incoming messages appear in French for that player.

A translated confirmation message is displayed in the selected language:

You set your language to French

✅ Permissions
None needed — all players can use /language.

💬 Example
Player A: Hello everyone!
Player B (language: fr): > [PlayerA] Bonjour tout le monde !
Player C (language: de): > [PlayerA] Hallo zusammen!

📌 Notes
Internet connection is required to use translation services.
